title: Prescriptive CycloneDX BOM Schema v1.6 (Aligned with Official Design)
description: A comprehensive JSON schema for CycloneDX v1.6, architecturally aligned with the official schema to facilitate accurate comparison.

bomFormat.description: Specifies the format of the BOM. The bomFormat property is Required, and its value MUST be 'CycloneDX'.

specVersion.description: The version of the CycloneDX specification the BOM conforms to.

serialNumber.description: A unique serial number for the BOM. If specified, it MUST conform to RFC 4122 (urn:uuid:*).

version.description: The version of the BOM. Recommendation: Whenever an existing BOM is modified, the version of the BOM SHOULD be incremented by 1.

metadata.description: Provides additional information about the BOM.

components.description: A list of software, hardware, and data components.

externalReferences.description: Provides the ability to document external references to the BOM.

dependencies.description: A dependency graph of components and services.

compositions.description: Compositions describe the completeness of the BOM.

annotations.description: Provides a mechanism to annotate the BOM with external information.

formulation.description: Describes how the BOM was formulated.

declarations.description: The list of declarations which describe the conformance to standards.

assessors.description: The list of assessors. Each item MUST be an Assessor object.

attestations.description: The list of attestations. Each item MUST be an Attestation object.

claims.description: The list of claims. Each item MUST be a Claim object.

evidence.description: The list of evidence. Each item MUST be an Evidence object.

definitions.description: A collection of reusable objects (standards, levels, etc.).

standards.description: The list of standards. Each item MUST be a Standard object.

properties.description: Provides the ability to add custom properties to the BOM.

signature.description: An enveloped signature in JSON Signature Format (JSF).

metadata.description: Provides additional information about a BOM.

versionRange.description: A version range specified in Package URL Version Range syntax (vers)
